/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/cobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/cobot_interfaces/msg/detail/observation__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
